Built a top-of-funnel organic social strategy driving to a landing page for a $200K price reduction listing. In 5 days: 70,130 people reached, 1,694 landing page visits (avg 5:03 min), 24 leads captured. Home sold with 14 offers — all over asking.

Client Retention
Churn from
8% → 1%

Rebuilt the entire onboarding system from scratch — new SOPs, CPA-based onboarding frameworks, expectation decks, rep training, and a communication cadence that actually worked. Result: lowest churn in company history within 12 months.

Revenue Growth
Pricing Overhaul
+$3,412/Client

Redesigned agency pricing structure — moved website offer from one-time $800 to $351/mo MRR model. Net value per client: $3,412 in recurring revenue. Rolled out across 200+ clients with a full training and communication plan.

Vendor Optimization
SEO Cost Cut
43% — Better Results

Sourced, vetted, and negotiated new SEO vendor at $99/mo vs. $175/mo. Affected 40+ monthly SEO clients. Delivered better results AND happier clients. Net effect: significant annual savings with improved delivery quality.

Program Growth
PPC: 15 → 35+
Accounts

Built the PPC management strategy my team used to grow the program from 15 to 35+ clients with ad budgets from $750–$5,000/mo. Also expanded Nextdoor advertising from 12 to 40+ accounts. Built systems, not just campaigns.

I build the systems
behind the growth.

I came up through agency life — running accounts, writing copy, managing campaigns across every channel. Somewhere along the way I started caring more about the ops, the systems, the things that make marketing scale without breaking. Now I do both.

I've rebuilt onboarding from scratch, switched vendors for better results at lower cost, built AI tools that replaced freelancer pipelines, and personally managed campaigns that drove record revenue. My job is to make the machine run right — and build new ones when needed.

Team
7
Rep Network
40+
Clients
200+
Background

Before agency ops, I was at Shareability (formerly Contagious) promoting viral content for Pepsi, PizzaHut, Cristiano Ronaldo. 500M+ combined views. Kobe vs. Messi: Ad of the Decade with 144M views. I know how audiences work — and how to move them.
